text:

    devel/icu: Update distfile checksum and remove obsolete mirror

    Upstream rerolled source package [1], [2], [3] and SourceForge no longer hosts recent versions.

    1: https://gitlab.archlinux.org/archlinux/packaging/packages/icu/-/issues/1
    2: https://git.alpinelinux.org/aports/commit/main/icu?id=fc95c59998285564fbcb0bfb2443898c62e10171

    Approved by:    portmgr (blanket)
    MFH:            2024Q1
